landing.heroSubtitle: Empower your team to share suggestions, track momentum, and drive meaningful change in your organization.
landing.heroDescription: Suggistit brings people and decision-makers into one clear interface — for offices, buildings, and communities.
landing.humanInterfaceDesc: Submit in seconds. Photo, description, category. No email threads. No forms. No friction.
landing.transparentActionDesc: Every issue has a status. Every action has visibility. Expectations are aligned.
landing.governanceDesc: Workspaces operate independently. Organisations oversee portfolios. Ownership is protected.
landing.ctaHeadline: Stop losing track of issues and ideas.
landing.ctaSubhead: See what happens after you speak up.
landing.ownershipTrust: Workspace data ownership always remains with the workspace owner.
landing.stepSubmitDesc: Share suggestions with optional anonymity. Attach photos, documents, or voice recordings.
landing.stepEngageDesc: React with Champion, Support, Neutral, or Concerns. Add comments to discuss ideas.
landing.stepTrackDesc: Watch suggestions gain traction. Hot ideas rise to the top with our momentum system.
landing.stepActionDesc: Teams are auto-assigned. Track status from Open to Completed.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start collecting and acting on employee suggestions today.

dashboard.beFirst: Be the first to submit a suggestion!

suggestion.title: Title
suggestion.anonymousHint: Your name will not be shown
suggestion.submitSuccessAI: Suggestion submitted and enhanced with AI!
suggestion.pleaseSignIn: Please sign in to submit a suggestion
suggestion.shareIdeas: Share your ideas to improve our organization.
suggestion.logIssue: Log an issue or concern about this building.
suggestion.aiWillRefine: AI will help refine your submission.
suggestion.aiAutoImprove: Your suggestion will be automatically improved
suggestion.responsiblePartyHint: Enter a name or role responsible for this issue
suggestion.confidentialHint: You can do it here by selecting
suggestion.disclaimerDesc: Suggistit is designed for everyday workplace improvements — sharing ideas, spotting issues, and helping organisations get better.
suggestion.disclaimerWarning: It is not intended for reporting serious HR, legal, misconduct, or safeguarding concerns.
suggestion.disclaimerAdvice: For any sensitive matters, please use your organisation's official reporting channels or speak directly with Human Resources.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Each office, building, or community operates as its own workspace.
pricing.subtitleNote: Subscriptions apply per workspace. Organisations group multiple workspaces for portfolio oversight.
pricing.ownershipNote: Workspace data ownership always remains with the workspace owner.
pricing.vatNotice: Prices shown exclude VAT. VAT added where applicable (EU only).
pricing.signInRequiredDesc: Please sign in to subscribe to a paid plan.
pricing.checkoutFailedDesc: There was a problem starting the checkout process. Please try again.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Click "Submit Suggestion" and share your idea with a title, description, and category. Attach photos, documents, or voice recordings to support your idea.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Support your suggestions with multiple file types to provide context and evidence.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Let AI enhance your suggestions with better clarity and professional language. Available on Pro plans and above.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Express your opinion with our 4-tier reaction system. Each reaction type carries different weight in momentum calculations.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Each suggestion has a momentum level based on weighted reactions, comments, views, and time since submission.
howItWorks.step6Desc: Organizations can create teams and assign members to handle specific suggestion categories.
howItWorks.step7Desc: Suggestions flow through a clear status workflow. Admins can update status to keep everyone informed.
howItWorks.step8Desc: Quickly find what matters most with powerful filtering options.

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsDescription: Choose how you want to receive notifications about suggestions and assignments.
settings.inAppDescription: Show notifications within the app when you're online
settings.pushDescription: Receive push notifications on your device

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this page
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
